summary: Iteration 12: Google OAuth migration verified - all Emergent auth references removed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login and Signup pages have both 'Continue with Google' and 'Continue with GitHub' buttons. Google callback page properly handles error states. Email login form works correctly with error handling.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns 200 healthy
Backend: GET /api/auth/google returns 503 'Google OAuth not configured' (expected - keys not set locally)
Backend: POST /api/auth/google/callback returns 503 when keys not configured
Backend: POST /api/auth/google/callback returns 422 when code missing from body
Backend: GET /api/auth/github returns 500 'GitHub OAuth not configured' (expected - keys not set locally)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with valid credentials (test@cursorcode.ai)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/signup creates new user
Backend: POST /api/auth/signup returns 400 for duplicate email
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401/403 without token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 with invalid token
Frontend: Login page renders with 'Continue with Google' button
Frontend: Login page renders with 'Continue with GitHub' button
Frontend: Login page has email/password form with data-testid attributes
Frontend: Signup page renders with 'Continue with Google' button
Frontend: Signup page renders with 'Continue with GitHub' button
Frontend: Google callback page exists at /auth/google/callback
Frontend: Google callback page handles error state (shows error message, 'Back to Login' link)
Frontend: Email login form shows 'Invalid credentials' toast for wrong credentials
No references to 'auth.emergentagent.com' or 'session_id' in frontend code
critical_code_review_comments: Google OAuth migration complete - frontend now uses window.location.href redirect to /api/auth/google
GoogleCallbackPage.js extracts 'code' from URL query params (searchParams.get('code')), not hash
Backend /api/auth/google returns RedirectResponse to Google consent when configured, 503 when not
Backend /api/auth/google/callback uses POST with JSON body {code: string} for code exchange
All session_id and auth.emergentagent.com references removed from frontend
AuthContext.js no longer checks for session_id in hash
App.js ProtectedRoute no longer checks for session_id in hash
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified Google OAuth migration from Emergent-managed auth (auth.emergentagent.com + session_id hash) to standard Google OAuth2 (redirect + code exchange). Frontend pages (LoginPage.js, SignupPage.js) now redirect to /api/auth/google. GoogleCallbackPage.js extracts code from URL query params and POSTs to /api/auth/google/callback. Backend returns 503 when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is not set (expected for local/preview env). All tests passing.
oauth_configuration_note: Google OAuth returns 503 because GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is not configured locally. This is expected behavior - actual OAuth keys are set in production (Render). GitHub OAuth similarly returns 500 when not configured.
